description: Cross-platform desktop app that uses AI to categorize files and suggest cleaner, descriptive names for images, documents, and media. Runs privately on-device with local GGUF models via bundled llama.cpp (CUDA/Vulkan/CPU backends); can optionally use remote LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini, or any OpenAI-compatible API).
notes: Models are not bundled — download them in-app via Settings → Select LLM on first run (a visual LLM also needs a matching mmproj file).
Settings live in %APPDATA%\AI File Sorter and persist across Scoop updates.
A CUDA or Vulkan GPU accelerates inference; a CPU backend is included as a fallback.
